hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The council’s signals are modest and largely defensive. BTC is the only long tilt but its composite and alpha are near zero, making the edge fragile. ETH, SOL and LTC are flat with negative composites and elevated beta/volatility, especially SOL and LTC where alpha deterioration signals fragility. Data‑quality concerns (zero prices) also warrant a cautious sizing approach. We therefore keep overall exposure modest (multiplier <1) and make only small conviction tweaks.
